theater_description: Short early-urban battle window aligned to Amnesty's first-half-of-August investigation sample.
civilian_area_note: No civilian denominator retained because the retained source chain provides only a floor of documented civilian deaths in investigated attacks.
split_reason: Retained because the Amnesty investigation gives a bounded early-city battle death floor and qualitative attribution context.
quality_note: Useful documented floor for civilians killed in investigated attacks, but attribution is not complete enough to assign the whole floor to one actor.

geographic_scope: East Aleppo and adjacent city sectors
theater_description: Renewed siege and final assault on opposition-controlled East Aleppo through evacuation.
geometry_method_note: No neighborhood-level geometry retained in this retrofit.
civilian_area_note: Civilian exposure proxied only by the reported 275,000 residents in eastern Aleppo, with high uncertainty because displacement and evacuation accelerated later in the siege.
split_reason: Retained as the main late-war Aleppo row with strongest siege/final-assault civilian-harm reporting.
quality_note: High-value row with useful civilian counts and one specific Russian-Syrian coalition event, but no complete actor-separated total or combatant denominator.
